pages.title: Recalibrating Rates
pages.text: $(bold)When to recalibrate$(): $(li)Factory structure needs to change $(li)Need to upgrade machines $(li)Different input resources (iron ore → gold ore)$(br2)$(bold)How to recalibrate$(): $(li)Right-click PreFab (enter config menu) $(li)Wait 60 seconds $(li)Right-click again (stop simulation from menu) $(li)New rates measured and cached.

pages.title: State Persistence
pages.text: $(bold)States persist across$(): $(li)[DONE] Chunk unload/reload $(li)[DONE] Server restart (if saved properly) $(li)[DONE] PreFab picked up as item (PreFab-as-Item feature)$(br2)$(bold)Stored in$(): PreFab's NBT data

pages.title: Multiple PreFabs
pages.text: $(bold)Each PreFab has independent state$(): $(li)PreFab A: CACHED $(li)PreFab B: SIMULATING $(li)PreFab C: HALTED$(br2)No coordination (yet) - future Factory Controller will manage multiple PreFabs$(br2)---
